recentTweets.text:
Fraud Around and Find Out!

Ohio indicts an alleged fraudster uncovered by @lukerosiak.

Congress needs to act on my anti-fraud package!

I’m proud to see the @DeptofWar launch their Foreign Risk Evaluation Program to stop China from stealing American technology.

The new criteria builds on the due diligence reforms I championed in the Small Business Innovation and Economic Security Act, strengthening protections

I’m putting scammers in the slammer!

Let’s save taxpayers $240 billion and stop fraudsters. https://t.co/WrpE5v59o5

🚨The Senate will soon decide: protect fraudsters, or protect taxpayers.

My Protecting American Taxpayers Act includes bills from my colleagues that would recover stolen funds, protect taxpayer dollars, and stop fraudsters.

https://t.co/ZJfaEQlvPb

To recover stolen funds:
👏@nickshirleyy looked and now we all see. He should be applauded, not criticized. https://t.co/uUk01klVB6

Fraudsters have been cashing in on hardworking taxpayers for too long.

At today's @HSGAC_GOP hearing, I will shine a light on the abuse, expose the loopholes, and push for accountability.

Tune in 👇
https://t.co/0JBuCTH5iT https://t.co/N8l7yFtvLq

Taxpayers are losing $1.4 BILLION every day to fraud!

I'm leading the charge to stop the theft, recover stolen dollars, and hold fraudsters accountable.

Let's put scammers in the slammer. 🐷 https://t.co/FmqhINOrCX

America’s future is taking root in the same rural communities feeding and fueling the world.

This investment will help Iowa turn cutting-edge research into American-made products, support our producers and entrepreneurs, create good-paying jobs, and help ensure the next
RT @SenateGOP: Lindsey Graham: An American Original https://t.co/HnnQIX0OS6

Thank you, @RandPaul, for convening this hearing.

Looking forward to hearing from @nickshirleyy and @JamesOKeefeIII tomorrow.

Let's make 'em squeal! 🐷

Today, I honored my dear friend and colleague, @LindseyGrahamSC. 

Lindsey dedicated his life to serving our nation—in uniform and in the Senate. He was a fierce defender of freedom, a steadfast mentor, and a loyal friend who meant so much to my family.

We will miss him dearly. https://t.co/ExPQQQ4CZq

Congratulations to Iowa's own Plas-Tech Tooling in Garner for being named an SBA Freedom 250 Patriot Pitch semifinalist! 🇺🇸

This small business is proving once again that Iowa entrepreneurs are leading the way in innovation and American manufacturing.
RT @SenateGOP: Senator Graham was an American original. https://t.co/IalPNHA55a

I am stunned and deeply saddened by the passing of my dear friend, Senator Lindsey Graham.

The Senate has lost a bold leader whose influence will be felt for generations.

Please join me in praying for his family and loved ones during this difficult time. May he rest in peace.

Fraud around and find out! #FAFO.
 
Look forward to hearing more in person from @nickshirleyy
Another fraud ring is out of business! 👋 https://t.co/DftAtaPNEH

Small businesses shouldn't have to pay the price for Washington's confusing regulations.

My SMART Energy Efficiency Standards Act provides certainty for manufacturers, distributors, and contractors while helping keep costs down for consumers.

https://t.co/mjscbyNypj

Veterans are sick and tired of being ignored by the VA.

The Trump admin deserves tremendous credit for righting the ship to ensure veterans and their families are properly taken care of.

Thank you, @SecVetAffairs, for crushing the Biden backlog!

https://t.co/Z8iKXMqB3L

America's story has always been one of courage, sacrifice, and freedom.

As we celebrate a historic 250 years, let's remember that freedom isn't guaranteed—it must be defended and passed on to the next generation.

Read more 👇

America’s small businesses are driving defense innovation!

I'm urging @SecWar to fully implement my SBIR reforms to cut red tape, strengthen our defense industrial base, and help innovative small businesses deliver for America's military.

Our warfighters deserve the best https://t.co/SQz9N7HdC4

Fraudsters are stealing $1.4 billion from taxpayers every single day!

Enough is enough.

My Protecting American Taxpayers Act would recover stolen funds, protect taxpayer dollars, and stop fraudsters.

Fantastic work by @EDSecMcMahon

Fraudsters may have been able to skip class but they won’t be able to escape jail time!

DOGE may have ended, but the mission hasn't. Thanks @elonmusk for getting it started. 

As chair of the Senate DOGE Caucus, I'm committed to keeping the effort alive because If you can't find waste in Washington, you didn't look. 👀

https://t.co/Z3I2XXgU3i

Happy Independence Day! 🇺🇸

As we gather with loved ones to celebrate a historic 250 years, join me in honoring our nation's founding ideals and remember that the American spirit is defined by hard work, resilience, and hope for a brighter future.

From our farmers and factory https://t.co/jeVE3Cz9Pg

RT @SenateGOP: 250 years on, America remains the greatest nation in the world. 

May God continue to bless our country and its people. http…

No Tax on Tips. No Tax on Overtime.

7.5M+ workers saved with No Tax on Tips.

29M+ kept more in their pockets with No Tax on Overtime.

Promises made, paychecks protected. 💪🇺🇸

So true, @SBA_Kelly!

Democrats were intent on raising your taxes.

Thankfully, President Trump signed the Working Family Tax Cut, which has already saved Americans more than $82 billion! https://t.co/UTknlfrSTx

This year's Entrepreneur Expo focused on what keeps Iowa strong💪

Thriving small businesses = a stronger America https://t.co/RgW6dCF8H8

Farmers have been asking for relief, and President Trump is delivering!

I’ve long fought to remove these fertilizer duties, which have cost American farmers $7 billion. Now, farmers can save $1.82 billion a year and better provide the food, fuel, and fiber America depends on.
https://t.co/WQAwFGPQ2O

One building sold. Hundreds of millions in future costs avoided.

Now let’s do the same with thousands of other underused federal properties! 🐷💰

https://t.co/ZGshwCf3vX

This sale takes over $500 million in required updates off taxpayers’ tab.

Empty government buildings are a waste. Sell them ALL!

https://t.co/C5jsJwapDh

In the Senate, I’m working to expand access to capital & fed contracting opportunities for Iowa small businesses.

Listen as @SBAgov's Josh Carter explains how the SBIC program supports our job creators in growing and hiring. https://t.co/XnMnYwqZa6

The Working Families Tax Cuts are delivering!

✅ $82 BILLION in tax relief 

✅ Tax cut for 97% of filers 

✅ $3,400 average refund 

✅ Millions of Americans keeping more of what they earn

Iowa leads the nation in affordable, reliable energy, powering America’s agriculture and defense industrial base.

@andrewoetting explaining one of our state's greatest assets as an engine for future growth.👇 https://t.co/kouR4Vlb7i
RT @ChuckGrassley: Happy bday to my friend & colleague Joni Ernst it’s an honor serving Iowans w u Guess I owe u an ice cream bday cake sin…

Another successful Entrepreneur Expo in the books! Thank you to Iowa State University and all of our incredible speakers and attendees for joining me in Ames today.

 Great connecting with Iowa entrepreneurs about opportunities to grow, innovate, and strengthen America's defense. https://t.co/CJlJytB9AL

Sky-high fertilizer costs have squeezed family farmers for too long. In some cases, it accounts for 1/3 of a farmer’s input costs!

This bill shines a light on the fertilizer market and takes steps to help lower costs.

https://t.co/98IZNioeWq

While this bill includes many important wins, my fight to fix Proposition 12 isn’t over.

Iowa producers – not out-of-touch activists in California – know how to raise livestock. I’ll continue standing up for family farms against this harmful overreach.

https://t.co/0xAjCZeKxD

And my work isn’t done there.

I’ll continue pushing for permanent, year-round E15 and policies that put Iowa farmers, producers, and rural communities first.

https://t.co/tnuqtPc0cZ

American tax dollars should never fund research in China, Russia, or Iran.

This bill includes provisions to stop taxpayer-funded research from benefiting our adversaries.

https://t.co/dimjKgpJP8

🧵Iowa farmers and producers across the country do the hard work of feeding and fueling America.

The newly released Farm Bill includes many of the priorities I’ve fought for on behalf of Iowa agriculture.
🚜🌽🐄🐖

My Entrepreneur Expo in Ames is live NOW! Tune in
👇
https://t.co/LigIB0mAlk

I'm cracking down on fugitive fraudsters flying high on taxpayer dollars by fleeing justice, and the country.

My new bill requires scammers to surrender their passports to get bail.

Read more ⬇️

American taxpayers fund agricultural research to help American farmers. So why is the money flowing to China and Russia?

Taxpayers should be FURious at who and what we’ve funded. No more on my watch!

Federal buildings have become taxpayer-funded ghost towns.

Sell them!

Put the least-used buildings on the auction block tomorrow and let the bidding begin.

https://t.co/jpCRhHpPam

We’re excited for my fourth Entrepreneur Expo tomorrow in Ames, Iowa!

Join us to hear how your business can support America’s national security 🇺🇸

https://t.co/oOgQw1J0MN

Indicted in a $250 million food-for-kids scheme, fled to Somalia, and now in @FBI custody.

My Preventing Fugitive Fraudsters Act strips fraudsters of their passports before trial!

After all, fraudsters won't need a passport for their final destination, which is behind bars.
🚨SQUEAL REEL: Anyone ripping off hardworking Americans won’t be needing a passport to reach their final destination, which is JAIL. https://t.co/BXU26VcFy9

My fourth and final Entrepreneur Expo in Ames is this Tuesday, June 30! 

This is a great opportunity to meet with America’s largest buyer—the federal government! 👇

https://t.co/oOgQw1J0MN

I’m introducing the Preventing Fugitive Fraudsters Act, requiring indicted fraudsters accused of stealing taxpayer dollars to surrender their passports before pretrial release unless they can prove this requirement is unnecessary.

After all, anyone ripping off hardworking https://t.co/kFFKv3DuAg

Minneapolis-St. Paul International (MSP) may be the favorite hub for fraudsters trying to catch a flight without getting caught themselves.

Nearly $1 million of cash stashed in luggage leaves the country every day from the airport. 💵🧳💵

The large sums are suspicious because

🧵Fugitive fraudsters are fleeing justice, and the country. ✈️

Scammers are catching flights with stolen cash stashed in their carry-ons, even AFTER being caught by law enforcement.

Here’s how con artists are flying high on taxpayer dollars and what I am doing to ground them https://t.co/AON4L1zq3w

🚨The suspect in an alleged $89 MILLION healthcare fraud scheme used student athletes as government-funded ATMs.

Thank you @WHFraudTF for catching this despicable doctor!
Anyone ripping off hardworking Americans won’t be needing a passport to reach their final destination, which is behind bars. https://t.co/GMnEsOuhEq

Bad time to be a fraudster! Great work @DAGToddBlanche and the @WHFraudTF. 

The fraud gravy train is over. https://t.co/jVeLr85ULX

‼️American taxpayer dollars should never fund animal research in adversarial nations, including bizarre studies like cats-on-treadmills in Russia.

That’s why I fought to include a provision in the Senate Farm Bill to stop sending your tax dollars to Russia and China and instead

Activist Judge Sparkle Sooknanan spent over 3,000 hours defending illegal aliens in deportation proceedings.

She is now blocking the federal government from making sure those illegals aren’t on our voter rolls.

We need to pass the SAVE America Act NOW!

On the anniversary of the Dobbs decision, we celebrate a historic victory for life. 

I will always fight to protect the gift of life and support mothers - no matter their situation. https://t.co/KH7sZbS3Cy
